description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a dark gray exterior and a flat, angular roofline. The structure features large, rectangular windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The property is surrounded by a black fence and landscaped with several trees and shrubs, providing privacy and greenery. A driveway leads to a covered carport on one side, while a wooden deck and a small swimming pool are visible in the backyard. The roof includes solar panels and a skylight, emphasizing energy efficiency and contemporary design. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and minimal decorative elements, reflecting the house's clean, modern aesthetic.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark gray facade, large windows, a flat roof, and landscaped yard with a pool and carport. The design is sleek and contemporary, featuring solar panels and a fenced perimeter.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an elevated angle, highlighting the backyard with a pool, wooden deck, and surrounding trees.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the house from the front, displaying the main entryway, large windows, and the carport to the right.
description_view_2: View 2 captures the rear of the house, emphasizing the solar panels on the roof, the backyard pool, and the fenced boundary.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the side of the house with the driveway, carport, and a clear view of the front yard landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with minimal overhang, no porch, and clean lines matching the modern aesthetic
